title: Homer Uchiha Sky Overlay
description: A sky overlay for the new popular Tiktok meme of "Homer Uchiha."
body:
# Homer Uchiha Sky Overlay
A sky overlay for the new popular Tiktok meme of "Homer Uchiha." I found it pretty amusing to create this pack so I want to share it with you all. The pack consists of a red background with little mountains spread around the environment. Then, our sky contains the main star of our texture pack, "Homer Uchiha."

(This is a FabricSkyBox texture pack)

![Homer Uchiha](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98a5ce086dae2102324d1fe53502d23f0f235807_0.webp)
